title: Single Agent Voice Workflow
description: Voice workflow run: receive transcript, invoke agent run, stream response tokens back to caller
state: _input_history: list[TResponseInputItem]  — accumulated conversation turns (user + assistant messages)
_current_agent: Agent  — may be updated after each run if agent handoffs occur
activity_flow: Receive transcription: str from caller (VoicePipeline or direct invocation)
YES → yield event.data.delta (text chunk streamed to caller)
[Loop] more stream events? → back to iterate
branching_conditions: callbacks present → fire on_run hook before processing
event filter in VoiceWorkflowHelper: only 'raw_response_event' + 'response.output_text.delta' events are yielded; all other event types are silently dropped
last_agent may differ from initial agent if Runner performed a handoff during the run
key_methods: SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow.__init__(agent: Agent, callbacks: SingleAgentWorkflowCallbacks | None = None)
key_relationships: VoiceWorkflowHelper wraps RunResultStreaming to filter text delta events
VoicePipeline (caller) invokes workflow.run(transcription) and streams text to TTS
important_notes: run() is an async generator — it yields text chunks incrementally, suitable for real-time TTS streaming
Input history is persisted across calls, enabling multi-turn conversation context
Agent handoff is transparent: result.last_agent replaces _current_agent after each turn
VoiceWorkflowHelper filters only 'response.output_text.delta' events from the raw stream; tool call events, metadata events etc. are excluded from TTS output
SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow is the simple/default implementation; complex workflows should subclass VoiceWorkflowBase directly (see MyWorkflow example with secret-word branching)
VoicePipeline orchestrates STT → workflow.run() → TTS; SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow sits in the middle step
example_custom_workflow_pattern: Custom subclass of VoiceWorkflowBase can add pre-conditions (e.g. secret-word check)
If condition met → yield hardcoded response, append to history, return early (skip Runner)
Otherwise → same pattern: Runner.run_streamed → VoiceWorkflowHelper.stream_text_from → yield chunks → update history/agent
